title: How to Take Smart Notes
body_markdown:
## How to Take Smart Notes — Sönke Ahrens

The Zettelkasten pitch, but written for knowledge workers. Short
enough to reread annually.

- **Fleeting notes** → scratch capture, short lifespan
- **Literature notes** → one per source, in your own words
- **Permanent notes** → one idea, self-contained, linked

Ahrens's real point: the cost of good note-taking is front-loaded;
the payoff is downstream, when you write and the arguments have
already composed themselves.
